title: Korean Delicate Vegetable Bowl
description: A simple and flavorful vegetarian Korean-inspired bowl filled with a variety of colorful vegetables and a crispy fried egg.
instructions: Cook the rice according to the package instructions.
Heat sesame oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add sliced vegetables and cook until they are tender.
In a small bowl, mix GoChuJang sauce and 1 tablespoon of water.
Add the sauce mixture to the pan and stir to combine.
Push the vegetables to one side of the pan.
Crack in the eggs and scramble them until cooked through.
Mix the eggs with the vegetables.
Serve the vegetables and eggs over the cooked rice.
Garnish with sesame seeds and chopped green onions.
